context: Tests whether the agent sets loadImage=pyxll.load_image on the customUI root (required for correct PNG transparency), keeps image attributes mutually exclusive, and uses the module:resource format for package-embedded images.

checklist.name: No image + imageMso together
checklist.description: No element has both an image attribute and an imageMso attribute simultaneously

checklist.name: No image + getImage together
checklist.description: No element has both an image attribute and a getImage attribute simultaneously

checklist.name: No imageMso + getImage together
checklist.description: No element has both an imageMso attribute and a getImage attribute simultaneously

checklist.name: Package resource image format
checklist.description: The two custom PNG buttons reference their images using the module:resource format (e.g. mw_addin:run_analysis.png) in the image attribute, NOT as a bare filename

checklist.name: Built-in icon uses imageMso
checklist.description: The Refresh Data button uses imageMso (not the image attribute) to reference a built-in Office icon

checklist.name: module.function callbacks
checklist.description: All onAction callback values use module.function format (e.g. mw_addin.ribbon.on_run)
